scripts.build: test -f ../swift-server/.build/release/slicc-server || (echo 'Error: slicc-server binary not found. Run: cd ../swift-server && swift build -c release' && exit 1) && test -d ../../dist/ui || (echo 'Error: dist/ui not found. Run: npm run build -w @slicc/webapp' && exit 1) && npm run generate:webkit-manifest && swift build -c release && node assemble-app.mjs
